features: TIME-HONORED BEEF TALLOW SUPPLEMENT: Grounded in the traditional wisdom of ancient practices, our grass fed tallow supplements help provide the same nourishing fat that our ancestors selectively hunted for to promote robust strength and overall health.

FUNDAMENTAL SUPPORT: Ancestral Supplements' beef tallow capsules supply fatty acids like CLA, oleic acid and palmitic acid, plus vitamins A, D, K and E, and provide a matrix for absorption of fat-soluble activators that support nearly all body systems.

WHOLE FOOD HEALTH AND SKIN SUPPORT SUPPLEMENT: In addition to providing support for immune health and whole-body wellness, our beef fat tallow supplements also promote healthy skin, bones, teeth, and gums.

NEW ZEALAND AND AUSTRALIAN GRASS FED BEEF: Made in small batches in the USA without GMOs, fillers, or flow agents and third party verified for purity, our supplements are sourced from 100% grass-fed cows, pasture raised without hormones in green fields.

DENSE NUTRITION FOR VITALITY AND IMMUNE SUPPORT: As the founders of the Beef Organ Movement, our mission is to make vital nutrition through the highest possible quality organ consumption accessible for all, putting back in what the modern world has left out.
parentTitle: Ancestral Supplements Men's Vitality Supplements, Complete Male Health Essentials, Enhance Energy Levels, Prostate Support, Nourish Kidney Fat, and Overall Wellness. Non-GMO, 180 Capsules Each
productBenefit: Promotes Cellular, Fertility, Hormone, Inflammatory & Immune Health. Supports Overall Human Growth and Development.
specialIngredients: New Zealand Grass Fed Bovine Tallow (From Suet)
title: Ancestral Supplements Grass Fed Beef Tallow Capsules, 3000mg, Nourishing Kidney Fat Supplement Supports Bones, Teeth, Gums, Skin, Immune and Overall Health, Non-GMO, 180 Capsules
